title: Agentic AI Optimization (AAIO)
preview: Proposes an optimization framework for multi-agent AI systems, addressing scheduling, resource allocation, and latency in compound AI pipelines.
summary: AAIO introduces a profiling and optimization methodology for agentic AI workloads where tool calls, retrieval, and LLM inference steps compose into dynamic execution graphs. Covers batching strategies, speculative prefetching, and router-level optimisation for heterogeneous agent pipelines.
datacenter: Relevant to next-generation AI serving infrastructure. Agentic pipelines have bursty, input-dependent compute patterns that challenge static batch schedulers — AAIO provides a framework for dynamic resource allocation in these systems.
metrics: Key result signal: end-to-end latency and throughput improvements for multi-step agent pipelines against baseline serving.
